name: Foamy Orange Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter until smooth.
2. Gradually add the icing sugar, beating continuously to ensure a light and fluffy mixture.
3. Beat in the beaten egg until well combined.
4. Very gradually incorporate the orange juice, one drop at a time, stirring constantly to maintain fluffiness.
5. Stir in the finely grated orange rind.
6. Continue beating the sauce until it becomes light and airy.
7. Serve immediately.
Yields about 1 1/2 cups.
